sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Avantor slides on revised outlook, revenue miss
feed.summary: This article reports that Avantor's stock has declined following a revised outlook and a revenue miss. The details surrounding the specific revisions and the extent of the revenue miss would be crucial to fully understand the impact on the company. Further information is needed to determine the financial implications for Avantor.

feed.title: Artemis II moon video reached Earth via AV’s ultra-precise laser aim
feed.summary: AeroVironment (AV) announced that its precision pointing hardware was crucial for the Artemis II Mission's Orion Artemis II Optical Communications System (O2O). This technology enabled the precise aiming of a laser communications terminal, allowing high-resolution video and images to be sent from lunar orbit to Earth at significantly faster speeds than traditional radio systems. AV's contribution, including a two-axis gimbal and fast steering mirrors, underlines its expertise in advanced electro-optical systems for challenging space environments.

feed.title: Aware Sets First Quarter 2026 Webcast for Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time
feed.summary: Aware, Inc. (NASDAQ: AWRE) will host a webcast on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time to discuss its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026. Financial results will be released via press release prior to the call, which will include a Q&A session with management. Interested parties can register for the webcast online or submit questions in advance via email.

feed.title: Commvault Expands Commvault Flex to Hitachi Vantara and NetApp for Scalable Resilience in the AI Era
feed.summary: Commvault has expanded its Commvault Flex partner ecosystem to include Hitachi Vantara and NetApp, aiming to provide enhanced data protection and cyber resilience for organizations with large, dynamic datasets. This expansion, leveraging hyperconverged secondary storage, addresses the growing demand for scalable and flexible solutions needed to manage and recover AI-generated data. The integration offers greater choice, scalability, and fast, reliable cyber recovery, helping customers meet stringent service level agreements and reduce costs.

feed.title: Venmo pushes beyond bill-splitting with cash back and more checkout brands
feed.summary: Venmo announced an expansion of its Stash rewards program, allowing customers to earn up to 5% cash back (capped at $100 per month) on everyday purchases at participating merchants like Sephora, Ulta, Taco Bell, and Pizza Hut. This move, supported by a new Gen Z-focused ad campaign featuring Rachel Sennott and Jordan Firstman, signifies Venmo's strategic shift from a peer-to-peer payment app to a broader money movement and spending platform. The company also reported double-digit year-over-year growth in its debit card and checkout products, reinforcing its focus on merchant adoption and everyday spending.

feed.title: Commvault targets AI data surge with Flex on NetApp, Hitachi
feed.summary: Commvault has expanded its Flex ecosystem to include Hitachi Vantara and NetApp, aiming to provide scalable resilience for large, AI-driven datasets. This integration, expected by summer, will enhance flash storage scaling, accelerate recovery times, and support cyber recovery SLAs for mission-critical AI applications. The move addresses the anticipated 33% annual growth in AI-ready data center demand, offering greater flexibility and choice for partners and customers.

feed.title: The Progressive Corporation Reports March 2026 Financial Results with Increased Net Income and Premiums Written
feed.summary: The Progressive Corporation announced strong financial results for March and Q1 2026, with net premiums written increasing by 10% and net income rising by 36% for March. The company also saw an improvement in its combined ratio and a 9% increase in total policies in force, signaling robust growth in its insurance market presence. Despite these positives, pretax net realized losses on securities increased in the quarter.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald reiterates HCA Healthcare stock rating at Overweight By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has reiterated its Overweight rating for HCA Healthcare Inc. (NYSE:HCA) with a price target of $588.00. Despite a cautious outlook on healthcare IT spending from providers, HCA Healthcare is seen as slightly undervalued, with six analysts revising earnings upwards and positive sentiment regarding its 2026 EBITDA guidance.

feed.title: Progressive Corp. (PGR) Misses Q1 EPS by 3c
feed.summary: Progressive Corp. (PGR) reported Q1 EPS of $4.80, falling short of analyst estimates by $0.03. Despite the EPS miss, the company's premiums written for the quarter came in at $23.64 billion, exceeding the consensus estimate of $23.28 billion. The stock closed with no change at $196.59.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Cummins to $700 From $645, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has adjusted its price target for Cummins (CMI) to $700, an increase from the previous $645, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects an optimistic outlook for the company, following other recent positive adjustments from firms like Wells Fargo and Citigroup, which also raised their price targets and maintained positive ratings. Cummins specializes in the design, manufacturing, and sale of diesel and gas motors, generators, and related components, with significant operations in the United States, China, and India.

feed.title: BTIG Research Reiterates Buy Rating for Prologis (NYSE:PLD)
feed.summary: BTIG Research has reiterated a "Buy" rating for Prologis (NYSE:PLD) with a $155 price target, suggesting a 12% upside from its previous close. This aligns with the stock's consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from 13 analysts, with an average target price of $138.16. The real estate investment trust recently met earning expectations with $1.44 EPS and exceeded revenue estimates with $2.25 billion, while also providing strong FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) Price Target Raised to $44.00 at Bank of America
feed.summary: Bank of America has increased its price target for CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) from $42.00 to $44.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating, which suggests a 2.52% upside. Analyst coverage for CNP is mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and an average price target of $43.27. The company recently reported a slight EPS miss for Q4 but beat revenue expectations and provided strong FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Fastenal (FAST) QQ1 2026 Earnings Report
feed.summary: Fastenal (FAST) reported strong Q1 2026 results with a 12.4% increase in daily sales, driven by strategic initiatives, new customer acquisition, and international expansion. Despite challenges like tariff pressures and lagging pricing actions affecting gross margins, the company maintained a robust cash flow and expects to stabilize margins by mid-2026. Management highlighted continued broad-based growth and leveraging technology for efficiency and customer relationships, with a commitment to disciplined cost management and shareholder returns.

feed.title: Progressive writes nearly $10B in March premiums as profit jumps 36%
feed.summary: Progressive (NYSE:PGR) reported strong results for March 2026, with net premiums written reaching $9,911 million, marking a 10% increase year-over-year. Net income for the month surged by 36% to $712 million, and the company's combined ratio improved to 88.8. Despite these positive operational metrics, the company recorded pretax net realized losses on securities of $218 million in March.

feed.title: CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) Price Target Raised to $94.00
feed.summary: Robert W. Baird has increased its price target for CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) to $94.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating and implying a 21.1% upside. This comes after CVS beat quarterly earnings expectations with $1.09 EPS and $105.69 billion in revenue, also setting a positive FY2026 guidance. The company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with institutional investors owning a significant portion of its stock.

feed.title: BTIG Research Issues Pessimistic Forecast for CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) Stock Price
feed.summary: BTIG Research has lowered its price target for CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) from $60 to $55 but maintains a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 46.28%. Despite the reduced target, the overall analyst consensus is still a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $68.24. The company recently surpassed Q4 EPS and revenue expectations and announced a $1.5 billion stock buyback program.

feed.title: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) Stock Rating Upgraded by Mizuho
feed.summary: Mizuho has upgraded American Tower (NYSE:AMT) from a "neutral" to an "outperform" rating, raising its price target from $189 to $205, indicating a potential 16.21% upside. This upgrade comes despite the company missing quarterly EPS estimates but beating revenue expectations and issuing strong FY2026 guidance. Analyst consensus rates American Tower as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $217.52.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on W.W. Grainger to $1,125 From $975, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target on W.W. Grainger (GWW) shares to $1,125 from $975, while reiterating a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a change in the analyst's valuation projection for the industrial supplies distributor. The company W.W. Grainger specializes in the professional distribution of industrial supplies and equipment, with significant operations in North America and a growing online distribution segment.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Steel Dynamics(STLD.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $207
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has reiterated its Buy rating for Steel Dynamics (STLD.US) and increased the target price to $207. This updated target indicates a positive outlook from the firm regarding the company's future performance. The report provided here is a document that would detail the rationale behind this rating and price adjustment.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma Inc. (NYSE:WSM) Offers a High-Quality Dividend Backed by Strong Fundamentals
feed.summary: Williams-Sonoma Inc. (NYSE:WSM) is highlighted as a compelling dividend stock due to its high-quality dividend profile, strong profitability, and sound financial standing. The company boasts a sustainable payout ratio, a reliable track record of dividend payments, and consistent moderate dividend growth. These factors are further supported by its high ROIC, strong operating margins, and a debt-free balance sheet, making it an attractive option for income-focused investors.

feed.title: From Warehouse Powerhouse to Blue Chip: Why Costco Could Be Next for the Dow
feed.summary: Costco, with its substantial market cap and robust financial performance, is being considered for inclusion in the Dow Jones Industrial Average. While the Dow is price-weighted and Costco's high share price would make it an influential component, certain factors like Walmart's existing representation and valuation concerns among retail investors present headwinds. Despite these challenges, Costco's strong membership model, customer loyalty, and consistent revenue growth position it well as a blue-chip company.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Price Prediction: The Stock Eyes 10% Upside
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) is currently trading at $145.16, with analysts predicting a 10.57% upside to $160.50, driven by strong performance in its Beauty and Health Care segments and a commitment to significant dividends and share buybacks. Despite tariff headwinds impacting recent earnings, management anticipates these pressures to ease, leading to margin recovery. The stock is considered a "buy" by the proprietary model, offering a long dividend record and durable cash flows at a re-evaluated valuation.

feed.title: Are Analysts Reframing ConocoPhillips’ (COP) Oil Leverage And Megaprojects As Its Core Cash Story?
feed.summary: Recent analyst reports are highlighting ConocoPhillips' (COP) exposure to high oil prices and volume gains, coupled with long-term growth from megaprojects like Willow and expanded LNG operations. This renewed focus suggests that the company's project pipeline and leverage to volatile crude markets will significantly influence its future cash generation. Despite upbeat headlines, investors should be aware of execution risks on major projects and continued exposure to crude market volatility.

feed.title: Christina Kosmowski to lead Moody’s (NYSE: MCO) $3.6B analytics arm
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation has appointed Christina Kosmowski as the new CEO of Moody's Analytics, its $3.6 billion analytics division, effective in June. Kosmowski brings nearly three decades of enterprise technology experience from companies like Salesforce and Slack, focusing on customer success and scaling AI-driven platforms. Her appointment signals Moody's continued emphasis on AI-driven analytics and software-style operating models.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on American Electric Power to $141 From $139, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has increased its price target for American Electric Power (AEP) shares to $141 from $139, while reiterating a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a modest upgrade in the outlook for the electric utility company.

feed.title: RBA Wealth Management LLC Has $272,000 Stake in Electronic Arts Inc. $EA
feed.summary: RBA Wealth Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) by 95.3% in the fourth quarter, selling over 27,000 shares and ending with 1,332 shares valued at $272,000. Other institutional investors like Farther Finance Advisors LLC and Sage Mountain Advisors LLC increased their holdings. Insider selling also quickened, with sales totaling $5.55 million in the last quarter, while analysts generally hold a "Hold" rating on the stock with an average price target of $188.30.

feed.title: The Case For and Against Buying RTX Stock Right Now
feed.summary: This article examines the arguments for and against investing in RTX stock, formerly Raytheon, amidst ongoing global conflicts. While increased defense spending could boost its substantial backlog, the company's valuation of 30 times projected earnings and modest dividend yield suggest limited upside. The author concludes that despite the reliable nature of the aerospace and defense industries, RTX's current stock price is overvalued, indicating it may not be a favorable buy at this time.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies stock (US90214J1016): Why its government software dominance matters more now for investors
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (TYL) is highlighted as a compelling investment due to its dominance in providing essential software to local governments across the U.S. The company's stable, mission-critical software, driven by predictable public sector budgets and a shift to SaaS, offers lower volatility and recurring revenue streams. Its strong market position, characterized by high switching costs and robust free cash flow, positions it well for long-term growth amidst increasing demand for public sector digitization.

feed.title: Understanding the Setup: (ATHS) and Scalable Risk
authors: Quantitative Research Desk - Contributor Editor: Thomas H. Kee Jr.
feed.summary: This article analyzes Athene Holding Ltd. (ATHS) 7.250% Fixed-rate Reset Junior Subordinated Debentures Due 2064, indicating strong near-term sentiment but a neutral mid and long-term outlook. AI models have generated three distinct trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—each with specific entry zones, targets, and stop losses. The analysis highlights an exceptional 9.0:1 risk-reward short setup, targeting a 2.5% downside versus 0.3% risk.

feed.title: Argan Inc director Leimkuhler sells $5.05m in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Argan Inc. director William F. Leimkuhler sold 8,444 shares of common stock for $5.05 million on April 13, 2026. This transaction occurred while the company's stock, AGX, was trading near its 52-week high, having returned 317% over the past year. InvestingPro analysis suggests the company may be overvalued, despite a strong Q4 fiscal year 2026 earnings beat and an expanded share repurchase program.

feed.title: Arbutus Receives U.S. FDA Fast Track Designation for Imdusiran for the Treatment of Chronic Hepatitis B
feed.summary: Arbutus Biopharma Corporation announced that the U.S. FDA has granted Fast Track designation for imdusiran, a drug for chronic hepatitis B. This designation will facilitate the development and expedited review of imdusiran, which has shown potential to achieve functional cure in trials. The company plans to work closely with the FDA to advance the drug, addressing a significant unmet medical need for the over 250 million people affected by chronic HBV worldwide.

feed.title: Aspire Biopharma's Buzz Bomb Caffeine Company Partners with Interwest Brokerage to Accelerate Retail Expansion
feed.summary: Aspire Biopharma Holdings, Inc.'s subsidiary, Buzz Bomb Caffeine Company, has partnered with Interwest Brokerage to expand its retail presence across the Intermountain West, specifically in Utah, Idaho, and Montana. Interwest will manage sales, marketing, and distribution for BUZZ BOMB™ in grocery, convenience, and alternative channels leveraging its strong regional relationships. This collaboration aims to significantly increase the product's market share and visibility in the functional beverage and energy categories.

feed.title: Waters Corporation's Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
feed.summary: Waters Corporation (WAT) is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings, with analysts expecting its EPS to be $2.31, a 2.7% increase year-over-year. Despite exceeding EPS estimates in the last four quarters, the stock has underperformed the S&P 500 and the Healthcare Select Sector SPDR ETF over the past year. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $390.57.

feed.title: Alibaba Cloud Adjusts Pricing for Big Model Services (BABA)
feed.summary: Alibaba Cloud has announced a price adjustment for its Bai Lian big model service platform, increasing service prices for select Model Unit (MU) units by 2% to 7%. This strategic move aims to ensure stable hardware supply, enhance service quality, and address rising computing market costs. Despite this, Alibaba Group Holding Ltd (BABA) stock is currently considered 16.4% overvalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value™, trading at $131.35 against a GF Value™ of $112.82, and its P/E ratio is above its 5-year median, while insider activity shows more selling than buying.

feed.title: Aurora Cannabis Inc. buys Safari Flower Co. in $26.5M deal
feed.summary: Aurora Cannabis Inc. has acquired Safari Flower Co. in a stock-and-cash deal worth $26.5 million, which includes a contingent $2 million cash payment. This acquisition provides Aurora with an EU GMP certified indoor cultivation and manufacturing facility in Ontario, aiming to boost its capacity for international medical cannabis markets like Germany, Australia, Poland, and the United Kingdom. Aurora's executive chair Miguel Martin stated that this move is a significant step in growing the company's international medical cannabis business and increasing its global market share.

feed.title: Dollar General’s media network rolls out AI store audio program
feed.summary: Dollar General is expanding its in-store audio media network to approximately 6,000 additional locations, bringing its total to 12,000 stores, through a new collaboration with QSIC. This initiative will leverage AI to deliver localized, real-time messaging and curated music, aiming to enhance the customer shopping experience and create value for brand partners. The move is a key component of Dollar General's broader growth strategy, focusing on digital initiatives and improving sales growth and customer loyalty, especially in the rural communities it serves.

feed.title: Did Anthropic Just Crown CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks the AI Cybersecurity Stock Winners?
feed.summary: Anthropic has launched "Project Glasswing," partnering with a select group of tech companies, including cybersecurity leaders CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks, to address software vulnerabilities using its advanced AI model, Claude Mythos. This collaboration positions CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks as key players in developing AI-powered cybersecurity solutions against evolving AI threats. The article suggests that this partnership solidifies their market leadership and makes their stocks attractive investments, especially given their current performance.

feed.title: Apple may use OLED screens for iPad Air next year: report (AAPL:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: A new report suggests that Apple is likely to incorporate OLED screens in the next iteration of its iPad Air, potentially in the coming year. This change in display technology could mark a significant update for the device. Shares of Apple were observed to be largely unchanged in premarket trading following the news.

feed.title: CrowdStrike led Gartner's SIEM report in 5-star ratings and reviews
feed.summary: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) has been recognized as a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) report. The company received the most 5-star ratings and verified reviews among all vendors, attributed to its Falcon Next-Gen SIEM platform which offers leading detection efficacy, cost efficiency, and agentic SOC transformation. Customers highlight the product's ease of deployment, comprehensive network visibility, and automation capabilities as key benefits.

feed.title: GE warns ITEP engine program needs ‘little bit more money’ for testing in FY27 budget
feed.summary: GE Aerospace officials stated that the Improved Turbine Engine Program (ITEP), which develops engines for Blackhawk and Apache fleets, will require additional funding in fiscal year 2027 to complete qualification testing. Despite significant progress with current funding, the Pentagon's FY27 budget request zeroed out funding for ITEP, potentially delaying the 2028 qualification timeline. GE is also in discussions with the Army to accelerate ITEP production for Blackhawks, potentially moving up the initial operational capability from FY29.

feed.title: Five things we learned from BetMGM’s Q1 trading update
feed.summary: Joe Levy reports on BetMGM's latest Q1 trading update, highlighting key takeaways from the operator's earnings call. The article covers insights into increased igaming competition and comments on the future of prediction markets, which are described as potentially leading to "shark-on-shark violence."

feed.title: Former Verisk CEO Scott Stephenson Joins ZestyAI's Board of Directors as Insurance Accelerates into the AI Era
feed.summary: Former Verisk CEO Scott Stephenson has joined ZestyAI's Board of Directors as the insurance industry increasingly adopts AI. Stephenson, who previously led Verisk to significant growth and market capitalization, will bring his expertise in data modernization to ZestyAI. His appointment coincides with ZestyAI's cash flow positive growth, doubling of product usage, and expansion of its client base, reinforcing its position as a leader in AI-powered risk intelligence for insurers.

feed.title: TeraWulf, BRP And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Wednesday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: U.S. stock futures were down on Wednesday, with several stocks moving lower in pre-market trading. TeraWulf Inc. (NASDAQ: WULF) saw its shares dip after reporting preliminary Q1 results, announcing a common stock offering, and forecasting lower Q1 revenue and adjusted EBITDA compared to the previous year. BRP Inc. (NASDAQ: DOO) also experienced a significant pre-market drop after suspending its FY27 guidance due to changes in the U.S. tariff environment.

feed.title: American Eagle launches summer campaign with Sydney Sweeney
feed.summary: American Eagle Outfitters Inc. announced its "Syd for Short: American Eagle Jean Shorts" summer campaign featuring actress Sydney Sweeney. The campaign highlights jean shorts as a summer essential, with Sweeney showcasing various styles in casual settings, and will offer over 200 shorts styles, including "Syd's Shop." American Eagle is also continuing its charitable partnership with Crisis Text Line, donating 100% of the purchase price from "Syd Jean" and "Syd Short" items to the nonprofit.

feed.title: Insurance claims decline further in 2025 as losses grow more complex, Verisk reports
feed.summary: A Verisk report indicates that insurance claims continued to decline in 2025, with homeowners' claims falling significantly, partly due to a quiet hurricane season. However, the report highlights an increase in complex and prolonged losses due to large-scale events like the Los Angeles wildfires and the growing influence of emerging risks such as those from the gig economy, silica, PFAS, and e-bikes. The data suggests that while claim volumes decreased, the nature of risks has become more concentrated and challenging to manage, leading to more severe losses.

feed.title: Equinix Pushes AI Into Network Layer With Fabric Intelligence
feed.summary: Equinix has launched Fabric Intelligence, an AI-driven control layer designed to automate network connectivity across distributed environments for AI workloads. The platform aims to move network operations from manual, ticket-driven processes to more autonomous, predictive orchestration using AI agents and natural-language interfaces. This initiative addresses the growing friction point where advanced AI compute vastly outpaces static network operations, which could otherwise limit AI deployments.

feed.title: Salesforce bets on conversation as the new interface for developers
feed.summary: Salesforce is introducing "Headless 360" and "Agentforce Vibe 2.0" to transform how developers interact with its platform, emphasizing conversational interfaces and AI agents. Headless 360 allows developers to build using APIs and AI from various sources, while Agentforce Vibe 2.0 provides an AI builder for creating agents with multimodel support and full UI control. Additionally, Salesforce is expanding Agent Fabric to enable scalable, multivendor AI orchestration, aiming for more efficient and optimized agent networks.

feed.title: Sydney Sweeney and American Eagle are Back Together
feed.summary: American Eagle (AE) has launched its summer campaign, "Syd for Short: American Eagle Jean Shorts," featuring Sydney Sweeney. The campaign emphasizes jean shorts as a timeless summer essential, showcasing Sweeney's effortless style in casual settings. Continuously supporting Crisis Text Line, custom denim styles from the campaign will donate 100% of purchase price to the organization, featuring a butterfly detail in honor of domestic violence survivors.

feed.title: AstroNova Q4 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: AstroNova reported a slight year-over-year revenue increase in Q4 2026 to $37.5 million, driven by growth in the Product Identification segment, with the second half of fiscal 2026 showing improved performance and momentum carrying into fiscal 2027. The company is focusing on stabilizing operations, improving cash generation, and reducing debt, while also evaluating strategic alternatives including potential sale or merger. Strategic changes, including a refined go-to-market strategy in Product ID and strong demand for TopRider solutions in aerospace, are expected to drive mid-single-digit revenue growth and EBITDA margin expansion in fiscal 2027, with an anticipated $2 million gross profit benefit from an expiring royalty obligation.

feed.title: Raytheon's new helicopter sensor mapped terrain in total darkness
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, successfully completed the first flight test of its RAIVEN Staring sensing system on a UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter. The system used three sensors to map urban, marsh, and coastline terrain in zero illumination, providing 270-degree situational awareness. Additional flight tests are planned throughout 2026 for this next-generation electro-optical and infrared (EO/IR) solution produced in McKinney, Texas.
